name: WLF_CHANGE_REQUESTS
description: Table to store change requests to be processed by ESS jobs.

columns.Name: CHANGE_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for change requests

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Object Id that holds Id of an object that has change request to be processed. eg: learning_item_id

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Object Type of the current change request

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Action type of the change request

columns.Name: CHANGE_REQUEST_DATE
columns.Comments: Object with request effective date to be considered while processing

columns.Name: DELETE_EXISTING_CONTENT
columns.Comments: Flag if we need to delete existing content

columns.Name: RESTART_IN_PROG_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Flag if we need to restart attempts

columns.Name: NOTIFY_TARGET_USERS
columns.Comments: Flag if we job needs toSend notification to target users

columns.Name: KEEP_COMPLETIONS
columns.Comments: Keep Completed enrollments of learning item.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Notification Message to Target users

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code for the action chosen

columns.Name: REASON_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments for the action reason

columns.Name: REQUEST_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Request start date

columns.Name: REQUEST_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Request end date

columns.Name: REQUEST_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: ESS request id that processed the change request

columns.Name: REQUEST_JOB_CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id of User who triggered the Request ESS job

columns.Name: REQUEST_RUN_DATE
columns.Comments: Request processed date

columns.Name: PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Change request status

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status

columns.Name: RECONCILE_IMPACT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Defines if reconcile have major impact

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_RELATED_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Previous effective related content id

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id of user who created the change request

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: OBJECT_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Stores object related info during delete operation.

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_FROM_TRANSCRIPT
columns.Comments: Flag if we need to exclude from transcript
